title: E2E Test Finding: Exposed secret in workflow
why_it_matters: This finding was seeded for e2e testing. A real credential leak would allow attackers to access your infrastructure.

title: E2E Test Finding: Overly permissive IAM policy
why_it_matters: This finding was seeded for e2e testing. Overly permissive policies violate least-privilege and expand your blast radius.

title: E2E Test Finding: Unencrypted S3 bucket
why_it_matters: This finding was seeded for e2e testing. Data at rest should be encrypted.
